title: Postcard Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Postcard Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Postcard Hotels are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Postcard Hotels:
Postcard Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels!
